notes: This remains a pilot under EXT-H-E7-BENCH-01 and cannot establish a formal method ranking or convergence claim.
The three core scale-one EXP coefficients run to 2M; their 1M checkpoints and evaluations also populate the 1M coefficient response, avoiding duplicate training.
Six outer scale-one EXP coefficients and three fixed controls run to 1M.
Long branches are ordered first so the fixed 60-worker queue minimizes the terminal long-task tail.

FINAL remains the primary fixed-horizon comparison; late-window mean, slope, variance, best-to-final drop, task-performance collapse, support/boundary events, and NaN/Inf failures remain separate diagnostics.
Seeds 204-207 remain untouched for later held-out confirmation after candidate selection.
